title: Frailea schilinzkyana

The Frailea genus is a small group of cacti, and it is native to South America. Frailea schilinzkyana is specifically found in the grasslands of Brazil and Argentina. The plant's classification is further categorized into the tribe Notocacteae and the subtribe Cereicladinae.
